name: Garlic Bread (Chef Du Jour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Cut the loaf lengthwise.
3. Spread the butter evenly on the cut side of the bread.
4. Sprinkle the minced garlic over the butter.
5. Place the bread under the broiler and brown until golden, turning occasionally to ensure even cooking.
6. Serve hot.
